response.justification: Candidate exceeds the 6+ years requirement with 15+ years of full-stack experience spanning the exact primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) plus relevant secondary languages (Java, Python-adjacent polyglot background). Recent role at re:cinq directly involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, matching the AI agent development requirement. Strong testing/TDD discipline, cloud (AWS CDK), containerization, and database experience (MongoDB, SQL) align well with the role.
strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React across multiple senior roles
Direct AI-agent and MCP framework experience at current re:cinq role
Strong testing/TDD background including authoring test frameworks and running TDD workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the resume
Limited evidence of Kotlin; Java experience is older (robotic arms era)
No explicit Vitest mention, though Jest/testing expertise is implied
